text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after Meisho Doto has a number of
victories under her belt...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm reminded suddenly of the hot spring ticket we
won in that raffle.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Um, well... Is it... really okay if I... use it?
choice_data_list: Of course it is. Go and enjoy yourself.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But... it was such a lucky prize. Using something
filled with so much joy... is actually kind of scary...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
So, if you d-don't mind, um, could you come with
me, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I think if you're with me, I'd feel a little more... at
ease.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh wooow! I can't believe we made it right on
time!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I usually go down the wrong road, or take the
wrong train line, so I'm not used to this
punctuality.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
And it's all because you looked up the maps and
timetables for me. Ehehe...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Wow... Is it okay for me to eat something that
looks this wonderful?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: ...Th-thank you for the food!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Mmm...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A charred smell comes wafting through the air. On
closer inspection, it appears Meisho Doto's
chopsticks have caught the flames of the dish
heater.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Hwaa!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm so s-s-sorry about that! Oh, and we were
having such a good trip!
choice_data_list: I'm just glad it was nothing serious.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's not every day you get to go to the hot
springs. I suggest the both of us regain our spirits
with a long bath.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
You're right—we're here to experience the hot
springs. Getting to relax in a warm, steamy tub
sounds so nice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, the water was lovely.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Although, I did trip over the basin... and I lost the key to my locker.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But that didn't stop me from enjoying the
springs. ♪ Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Um... On the news... it said there's going to
be a meteor shower today!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I looked into it and found a good viewing point in
the area. So, would you... like to go with me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: However...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I'm s-sorry! I g-got us lost!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Taking a right at the big pine tree should have
led us to the ocean, but... it's only more and more
forest...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It would be a shame to miss the meteor shower,
but going too far from the inn doesn't seem safe.
choice_data_list: Should we stop and head back?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Um... Would it be okay for us to... stay out a little
longer? Not too long, though... I promise.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I can give you a piggyback ride if you get tired!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I quickly, but respectfully, decline the piggyback
offer. The two of us walk for several more hours.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
We've m-made it! Wow, what a beautiful view.
And the night sky is filled with stars!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
If we wait long enough, I wonder if some shooting
stars will appear. I'm sorry to bother you again...
but could we stay a little longer?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... Thank you so much.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the two of us wait for the meteor shower
to start.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: ...I'm so glad you chose to come along, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure I'd be feeling really down in the dumps if
you weren't here.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
This is such a special occasion, and yet I burnt my
chopsticks and then got lost.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
...It's not just today. I felt the same way during the
Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
If you weren't there for me, Trainer, I just know I
would've spiraled.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
That's why I've built this habit of always calling
other people amazing, to... try and return the
favor.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Because without you, I couldn't have taken that
first... step.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. You're amazing, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto erupts with joy before I have the
time to respond.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh! There goes a sh-shooting star! The meteor
shower is here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look up to see dozens of shooting stars passing
by.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
This is amazing, I can't believe we're here to see
it!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Trainer, are you... happy right now?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Was I... a-able to bring you a wonderful
experience?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: ...Th-thank goodness!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
You know... I wanted to show my gratitude after
causing so much trouble...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So that was the reason she wanted to see the
meteor shower. It isn't normally like her to do
prior research and be so dead fixed on
something.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! Then I'm... I'm happy I could make you
happy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We enjoy the meteor shower together... The road
back to the inn, however, isn't so easy. We lose
our way yet again, and a deer chases us into a
river, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Meisho Doto and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
